pages.title: Bard
pages.text: Bard plus Scribe. Class-gate only — mod-original recipes preserved.$(br2)Cosmetic by intent, but the only source of music, the chess set, paint canvases, and the guide book in your hand.

pages.title: Instruments (11)
pages.text: Bagpipe, Didgeridoo, Ender Bass, Flute, Handpan, Lute, Piano, Tiny Drum, Triangle, Trumpet, Vielle.

pages.title: Chess set
pages.text: Crafted whole-set by Bard. Overrides the paired-fantasy rule (the matching polearm would normally live with $(l:classes/blacksmith)Blacksmith$(/l)).$(br2)$(bold)Chess Piece, Board Block.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Chess Board Knight$(/) helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots.$(br2)$(bold)Chess Board Knight Polearm.$(/)

pages.title: Books, paint, music discs
pages.text: $(bold)Guide Book$(/) — this book.$(br2)$(bold)Fishing Journal.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Canvases$(/) — long, tall, and large variants; plus Easel and Palette.$(br2)$(bold)Music Disc — Jam.$(/)$(br2)Matching trader: the Musician (instruments) and the Librarian (books and canvases).
